prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The State of California has awarded $80 million to Port of Hueneme for their PACED Project.
The PACED Project generates social and economic equity while providing substantial revenue streams.
The funding will help transform the Port into a zero-emission hub.
The funding will create more job opportunities for local residents to support vital Port operations.
The investment will strengthen the supply chain and improve the efficient movement of goods.
The funding will help create good paying green jobs.
Residents will benefit from cleaner air as a result of the investment.
Workers will find better jobs due to the opportunities created by the funding.
